articles.title: OnePlus confirms regional roadmap rethink amid key employee departures - Android Authority
articles.description: Several OnePlus's top talent in the UK and Europe have resigned, fueling speculations about company's exit from the region.
articles.content:
• OnePlus Europe is showing new signs of distress.
  • Several managerial-level employees in the region have left the company since last week.
  • This follows rumors that OnePlus is sh… [+3551 chars]
